BaZi Astrology

Articles and guides on BaZi Astrology by DAO Essence.

Birth Hours & Wealth Personalities: A Western-Friendly Guide

This guide uses the ancient "12 Earthly Branches" to reveal your innate "Wealth Archetype"—the personality strengths that shape how you earn and manage money, not a fixed fate.​

DAO Essence ·5 min read

Complete Guide to Five Elements Theory (Wu Xing) for Beginners

Learn everything about the Five Elements theory (Wu Xing, 五行) — Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water. Understand the generating and controlling cycles, how they relate to Chinese medicine, feng shui, personality, and health.

DAO Essence ·12 min read

How to Read Your BaZi Chart: A Step-by-Step Guide

Learn how to read and interpret your BaZi (Four Pillars of Destiny) chart step by step. Understand the Heavenly Stems, Earthly Branches, Five Elements, and Ten Gods in your birth chart.

DAO Essence ·8 min read

What Is BaZi? A Beginner's Guide to Chinese Astrology & Numerology

What is BaZi? Learn the fundamentals of the Four Pillars of Destiny — the ancient Chinese astrology system that maps your Five Elements birth chart. Understand Heavenly Stems, Earthly Branches, the Day Master, and how BaZi reveals your personality, career, and life path.

DAO Essence ·11 min read

Benevolence, Righteousness, Propriety, Wisdom, and Integrity

The foundational code of China's five-millennium civilization is encoded within the dynamic interplay of Benevolence, Righteousness, Propriety, Wisdom, Integrity and the Five Elements.

DAO Essence ·5 min read
